title: Applicability of other laws
doc_html:
§1375. Applicability of other laws

            Notwithstanding the provisions of R.S. 6:333 or any other law to the contrary, a covered financial institution may act in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 2018, No. 434, §1, eff. October 1, 2018.
doc_text:
§1375.  Applicability of other laws
Notwithstanding the provisions of R.S. 6:333 or any other law to the contrary, a
covered financial institution may act in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 2018, No. 434, §1, eff. October 1, 2018.
